help.howToCreate: How to create a work report?
howToCreateSteps: Fill in the work information (number, name, site manager, foreman)
Add completed work with hours and measurements
howToAccessControlSteps: You can use the barcode scanner to speed up the process
help.howToExportImport: How to export and import data?
exportSteps: In the reports list, use the actions menu (⋮)
importSteps: Select a previously exported Excel file
howToGenerateReportsSteps: From a work report, click "Generate PDF"
The system will automatically generate a professional report
The PDF will include all report information
For economic reports, use the economic analysis section
howToManageUsersSteps: Go to the "Users" tab in Management
Invite new users by sharing the invitation code
Approve pending users and assign roles
Assign specific works to each user
Manage permissions and access based on role
howToManageOrganizationSteps: Go to the "Organization" tab in Management
Complete legal data (Tax ID, Legal Name)
howToManageCompaniesSteps: Add companies with their contact details (Tax ID, phone, email, address)
View creator's name in the top right corner of each company card
Export your portfolio to Excel with all information
Use notes to add additional information about each company
howToInventorySteps: Go to "Inventory" to see current stock
Filter by month and year to view inventory for a specific period
Merge duplicate suppliers by selecting them and clicking "Merge"
Validate and automatically correct inventory errors with the "Validate and Correct" button
howToEconomicAnalysisSteps: Select the work and period to analyze
Review labor, materials, and machinery costs
Generate detailed economic reports in PDF
howToBrandingSteps: Changes apply automatically throughout the app
Your branding appears in PDFs and documents
howToUpdatesSteps: The app automatically checks for updates on startup
You'll receive a notification if new versions are available
Download and install with one click
Admins can manage updates from the panel
howToAIAnalysisSteps: Use the advanced scanner to capture invoices
AI will automatically extract data (date, supplier, invoice number)
If no report exists for detected date, it's created automatically
Select the work if you have multiple assigned, or it's assigned automatically
The AI assistant can answer questions about your reports
Generate smart reports with automatic analysis
help.whatIsSubscriptionAnswer: The system includes a 7-day trial period. After that, you need an active subscription to continue using all features. Admins can manage subscriptions from the panel.
help.howToUpdateApp: How do I update the application?
help.howToUpdateAppAnswer: The app will automatically notify you when updates are available. Simply download and install from the notification. For manual updates, consult with your administrator.
help.customBranding: Can I customize the app appearance?
help.customBrandingAnswer: Yes, administrators can customize the logo and corporate colors from the organization settings. Changes apply in real-time for all users.
help.aiAnalysisFeaturesAnswer: The app includes OCR for scanning invoices, automatic cost analysis, AI chat assistant for queries, and intelligent report generation with economic insights.
help.ocrScanningAnswer: Use the advanced materials or invoices scanner. AI will automatically recognize text, numbers, and structured data. You can review and edit before saving.
help.economicReportsAnswer: Reports include cost analysis for labor, materials, machinery, and subcontracts. They also show profitability, trends, and comparisons by work. Can be saved and exported as PDF.
help.advancedReportsAnswer: Advanced reports allow analyzing data by periods (weekly, monthly, quarterly, annual or custom) and filter by specific work. Include foreman hours analysis, workers by company, subcontract machinery, editable rental machinery (with option to edit dates, rates and delete), and number of reports per work. Can be exported in weekly, monthly or general Excel format.
howToDuplicatesSteps: When scanning an invoice, the system automatically detects duplicates
A dialog displays all duplicate invoices found
You can select which ones to delete using checkboxes
Click 'Refresh' in the header for global analysis
The system automatically relocates invoices to their correct date
help.duplicateInvoicesAnswer: Duplicate invoices are bills with the same number and supplier appearing in multiple reports. The system detects them automatically when scanning or updating data, showing you a dialog to decide which to keep or remove.
help.autoRelocateInvoicesAnswer: When an invoice is re-analyzed with AI, if the extracted date differs from the current report date, the system automatically moves it to the correct report. If that report doesn't exist, you can create a new one for that date. The invoice is immediately displayed in its correct location.
help.globalDuplicateCheck: What does global duplicate analysis do?
help.globalDuplicateCheckAnswer: When clicking the 'Refresh' button in the header, the system analyzes all existing work reports, identifies and automatically removes all duplicate invoices found. You'll receive a detailed summary of duplicates removed by supplier.
help.autoCreateWorkReport: How does automatic report creation work?
help.autoCreateWorkReportAnswer: When scanning an invoice with AI, if the detected date has no work report created, the system creates it automatically. If the foreman has multiple assigned works, a dialog appears to select the work. If only one work is assigned, the report is created automatically for that work. This feature enables quick data entry and automatic report creation.
help.rentalMachineryManagement: How does rental machinery management work?
help.rentalMachineryManagementAnswer: In Work Management, there's a specific tab to manage rental machinery. You can register machines with their provider, number, delivery and removal dates, daily rate and notes. The system automatically calculates rental days and total cost. This information appears automatically in daily work reports in read-only mode (if the machine is active on that date) and is included in PDF and Excel exports.
help.howToVoiceInput: How to use the floating voice button?
howToVoiceInputSteps: Use the floating microphone button in the work report form
Select the section you want to fill (Works, Machinery, Subcontracts, Materials or Observations)
Dictate the information and the system will process it automatically
Available commands: 'add group/row', 'delete last row', 'change company to [name]', 'copy previous group', 'mark [section] complete', 'unmark [section]', 'clear field [name]'
The button is always visible while editing a work report
help.howToAIAssistant: How to use the AI assistant?
howToAIAssistantSteps: Click on the AI chat icon at the top
Ask questions about your work reports, costs or analysis
The assistant can generate summaries, trend analysis and answer specific queries
Use commands like 'Summarize this week's costs' or 'Analyze most used machinery'
The assistant learns from the context of your works and reports
howToCalendarTasksSteps: Access the Task Calendar from the main menu
Create tasks with date, time, priority and description
Assign tasks to specific users or works
Mark tasks as completed when you finish them
Receive automatic notifications for pending tasks
View tasks in calendar or list view
help.howToFileSharing: How to share files with other users?
howToFileSharingSteps: Attach the file you want to share
The recipient will receive a notification
You can see the download status of your sent files
howToOfflineModeSteps: The application automatically saves data in local cache
When you lose connection, you'll see an offline indicator
You can consult previously saved reports
Changes will automatically sync when reconnecting
Export important data before working without connection
The network indicator keeps you informed of connection status
help.voiceCommandsAnswer: General commands: 'add group/row', 'delete last row', 'copy previous group'. Section-specific commands: 'change company to [name]' (Works/Subcontracts), 'change supplier to [name]' (Materials), 'mark [section] complete', 'unmark [section]', 'clear field [field name]'. The system processes natural language to understand your instructions.
help.howToNotificationsAnswer: You receive automatic notifications for: pending approval reports, new assigned tasks, shared files, administrator messages and system updates. You can see all notifications in the notification center and mark them as read. Office roles receive notifications grouped by work.
help.howToOfficeRole: What features does the office role have?
howToOfficeRoleSteps: View completed and approved work reports
Mass export of weekly and monthly reports in Excel
Access to economic analysis and saved reports
Notifications grouped by work of completed reports
Detailed information for each report: work, number and date
CANNOT create, edit or delete work reports
NO access to advanced reports or user management
Exclusive focus on administrative processing and export
help.isMyDataSecureAnswer: Yes, the system implements multiple security layers: data encryption, JWT authentication, database-level security policies (RLS), and compliance with international standards (ISO 27001, GDPR, SOC 2).
help.whatIsRLSAnswer: RLS (Row Level Security) are database-level security policies that ensure each user can only access data from their organization. This prevents information leakage between organizations and protects data confidentiality.
help.whatIsJWTAuthAnswer: JWT (JSON Web Token) is a secure authentication system that protects all system functions. Only authenticated users with proper permissions can access sensitive data or perform critical actions like publishing updates or analyzing invoices.
help.complianceStandards: What security standards does the system comply with?
help.complianceStandardsAnswer: The system complies with ISO 27001 (information security management), GDPR (personal data protection), and SOC 2 (security and availability controls). It includes role-based access control and leaked password protection.
howToSecuritySteps: RLS policies protect data by organization
JWT authentication protects all backend functions
The system complies with ISO 27001, GDPR and SOC 2
Passwords are validated against known breach databases
help.masterRole: Full system access and organization configuration.
help.adminRole: Full access to all functions, user and work management.
help.siteManagerRole: Work report and assigned works management.
help.foremanRole: Work report creation and access control.
help.ofiRole: Access only to approved and signed reports for administrative processing.
help.canEditAfterSave: Can I edit a report after saving?
help.canEditAfterSaveAnswer: Yes, you can edit any work report you created. Administrators can edit all reports.
help.autoSyncAnswer: Yes, all data is saved to the cloud and syncs automatically across all devices.
help.offlineUse: Can I use the app offline?
help.offlineUseAnswer: The app requires internet connection to save and sync data. However, you can export data locally to work offline.
help.recoverPassword: How do I recover my password?
help.recoverPasswordAnswer: On the login screen, click "Forgot your password?" and follow the instructions to recover it via email.
help.storageSpace: How much storage space do I have?
help.storageSpaceAnswer: Storage is managed by the system administrator. Contact the administrator if you need more space.
help.duplicateReport: How can I duplicate an existing report?
help.duplicateReportAnswer: In the reports list, use the actions menu (⋮) and select "Clone". This will create a copy of the report that you can modify.
help.approveReportsAnswer: Site managers and administrators can approve reports. Click the "Approve" button on any pending report.
help.manageLanguage: How do I change the language?
help.manageLanguageAnswer: Use the language selector in the top right corner. We support Spanish and English.
help.exportFormatsAnswer: You can export reports in PDF (individual) and Excel (weekly/monthly). You can also generate comprehensive economic reports.
